title: Manage Data on Your Atlas Cluster Using AWS AppSync Lambda Resolvers
description:
You can manage data on your Atlas cluster using AWS (Amazon Web Services) AppSync Direct
Lambda Resolvers. The Lambda function, serving as a resolver for the AWS (Amazon Web Services)
AppSync GraphQL API, enables seamless
CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations on your data in
your Atlas cluster. Integrating Atlas with AWS (Amazon Web Services) AppSync offers
a powerful, flexible solution for building scalable, serverless GraphQL
APIs.

children.text: Step 1: Create the Serverless Lambda function in .
Step 2: Test the AppSync API with a Lambda resolver as its data source.
